resources.string: Do you want to allow SumaMente to send you notifications?
Question about allowing notifications from the SumaMente app
Enter your username.\nUse between 4 and 12 characters
Complete the previous levels to unlock this level.
Button to close the instructions window
DO YOU WANT TO REPEAT THIS LEVEL?
Correct! Points earned: %1$d, Time used: %2$.2f s
Do you want to exit the game?
Progress ring showing the remaining time
You have reached the maximum allowed attempts to repeat the level
Incorrect answer. You have %1$d attempt(s) left.
You have used all your attempts.
Are you sure you want to exit?
YOU HAVE REACHED THE MAXIMUM ALLOWED ATTEMPTS.
Choose the correct answer from multiple options.
You have used all your attempts!
Select the data you want to reset
Are you sure you want to reset the selected data?
What data do you want to edit?
The numbers %1$s are repeated. Add them correctly!
The name must be between 4 and 12 characters long.
Oops! It seems someone is already using \nthat name, try another one.
The yellow numbers are repeated. Add them correctly!
The blue numbers are repeated. Add them carefully!
Be careful, some numbers might be %1$s. Add them correctly!
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Are you sure you want to change the flag?
Are you sure you want to change the language?
Add all the numbers except the first one
Add all the numbers except the second one
Add all the numbers except the third one
Add all the numbers except the last one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the first one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the second one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the third one
Add all the ROMAN numbers except the last one
Time limit not found for level %1$d
Solve the operations considering positive and negative numbers.
Add the integers, decimals, Roman numerals, and letters. Some may be negative!
Choose the \nresponse mode \nyou like the most
We will show you in 3 simple steps how to play…
First step: Decide how you want to play, you\'re in control!
Step two: Numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Focus and get ready! Let\'s see an example:
Step Two: Decimal numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see a Deci example:
Step Two: ROMAN numbers will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see a Deci example:
Step two: Letters and numbers will appear. A=1, B=2, etc., etc. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Step two: Letters, numbers, ROMAN numerals, and DECIMALS will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Step two: Letters, numbers, fractions, and SQUARE ROOTS will appear. Add the positives, subtract the negatives. Stay alert! Let\'s see an example:
Third step: Calculate the result of the numbers you saw.
Write or choose the correct answer before time runs out!
Great! Now let\'s see how much time you took and how many points you scored. 😊
You\'re ready! It\'s time to play and have fun. 🚀
Are you sure you want to exit without selecting a difficulty level? You\'ll have to choose next time you enter.
You must complete the previous level to unlock this level again
SUMAMENTE CHALLENGES! Compete and win prizes with players from around the world. We will notify you when the next event takes place. Get ready to shine!
How you earn points in SUMAMENTE!
• Each game gives you points when you answer correctly
• If you get all your answers right, you receive all your points
• If you make some mistakes, you receive fewer points
• Being fast gives you more points!
• If you answer in 1 second, you get the standard points
• If you\'re faster, you earn more points!
• If you take longer, you receive fewer points
• There are 7 different games: NÚMEROS⁺, DECI⁺, ROMAS, SUMARESTA, ALFANÚMEROS, MÁS⁺ and GENIO⁺
• Each game has 3 levels: Beginner, Advanced and Pro
• More difficult games and higher levels give you more points
• You can repeat any game whenever you want
• Play as many times as you want to improve your average response time
• Practice every day to increase your speed and accuracy!
30 levels. No mistakes. 24 hours. VICTORIS… Only victors will understand.
40 levels. Flawless. One single day. OPTIMUM… Only the optimal endure.
50 levels. Unbeatable. 24 hours. INVICTUS… Only the indomitable prevail.
The journey is just beginning. Complete 100 games and INITIUM will be yours.
Your consistency will be rewarded. Reach 200 games and earn this medal.
Train daily. Reaching 300 games proves your disciplined mind.
Only the bold move forward. Conquer 400 games without hesitation.
Your mind is steady. Reach 500 games and strengthen your legacy.
Don\'t stop. Complete 600 games and let your tenacity shine.
Face every challenge fearlessly. Earn this medal by reaching 700 games.
Wisdom comes from experience. 800 completed games will prove it.
Be the example. At 900 games, your determination will be undeniable.
Dare to reach the top. 1000 games will take you to glory.
Greatness is built with effort. Reach 1100 games and claim MAGNUS.
Your legacy will transcend. Complete 1200 games to be immortalized.
Speed is in your essence. Beat 90% of players and this crown is yours.
A lightning-fast mind. Beat 94% of users and this crown will appear for you.
The top 1% of the fastest. Your mind is a flash of light. This crown honors the legendary.
Begin your journey. Master NUMBERS⁺ Beginner and this trophy marks your start.
Keep pushing forward. Face every challenge in NUMBERS⁺ Advanced.
Leave nothing behind. Reach the end of NUMBERS⁺ Pro and earn CONFECTUS.
Start your decimal journey. Complete DECI⁺ Beginner and rise above.
Aim high. Finish DECI⁺ Advanced and ALTUS will be yours.
Don\'t stop. Conquer every challenge in DECI⁺ Pro with unwavering discipline.
Step by step. Complete ROMAS Beginner and leave your imperial mark.
Show your strength. Face all of ROMAS Advanced until the end.
Reach the Roman finish line. Beat every ROMAS Pro level and claim this trophy.
Lay the foundations of mastery. Complete ALPHANUMBERS Beginner with no gaps.
Earn your prize letter by letter. Advance through all ALPHANUMBERS Advanced levels.
Chase glory. Master ALPHANUMBERS Pro and let your mind shine.
Climb steadily. Rise level by level until you conquer SUMADD Beginner.
Only the tenacious go far. Face and complete SUMADD Advanced.
Strive for perfection. Finish SUMADD Pro without giving up.
Everything starts here. Complete MORE⁺ Beginner and unlock your origin.
Make progress your mission. Advance through all MORE⁺ Advanced challenges.
Become a model to follow. Finish MORE⁺ Pro and honor your example.
Begin your rise to genius. Complete GENIUS⁺ Beginner.
Let your intellect shine. Overcome every level of GENIUS⁺ Advanced.
Unleash your full potential. Conquer GENIUS⁺ Pro without looking back.
Eighth place. Leaves a mark in the ranking.
Seventh place. Excels in every challenge.
Sixth place. Its light does not go unnoticed.
Fourth place. Admired for their constancy.
Third place. Great in points and in spirit.
Second place. Only one rises higher.
Absolute peak. Occupies the first place in the global ranking.
Only supreme victors shall possess it…
This distinguished honor is awarded exclusively to those who complete all Sumamente challenges.
You conquered 30 different challenges without errors in a single day, earning the VICTORIS pin!
Your precision is exceptional: 40 levels completed flawlessly in 24 hours have granted you the OPTIMUM pin.
Excellence distinguishes you for solving 50 different challenges perfectly in one day, achieving the prestigious INVICTUS pin.
Your speed in %1$s is impressive! You\'re among the top 10%% of fastest players, crowning yourself with VELOCITAS.
Extraordinary reflexes in %1$s! Your quickness places you in the exclusive top 4%%, earning you the CELERIS crown.
Legendary speed in %1$s! You\'ve reached the elite 1%% in mental agility, claiming the prestigious VOLUCER crown.
You\'ve completed 100 unique games! Your dedication has earned you the INITIUM medal, the beginning of your collection.
200 games completed! Your consistency is admirable, thus achieving the FIDELIS medal.
The VIRTUS medal is yours for overcoming 300 different challenges. Your mental courage shows with every game!
400 games mastered! Your boldness has led you to conquer the prestigious AUDAX medal.
You\'ve demonstrated mental strength in 500 different games, deserving the exceptional FORTIS medal.
Perseverance has its reward! 600 completed games crown you with the TENAX medal.
Your fearless spirit has overcome 700 challenges, granting you the respected INTREPIDUS medal.
Wisdom comes with practice: 800 completed games make you worthy of the SAPIENS medal.
You\'re an example of determination! 900 conquered games have awarded you the exemplary EXEMPLAR medal.
Glory to your perseverance! You\'ve conquered 1000 challenges, reaching the glorious GLORIAM medal.
Magnificent achievement! By completing 1100 different games, you\'ve obtained the grand MAGNUS medal.
Immortal feat! You\'ve culminated 1200 unique challenges, consecrating yourself with the legendary IMMORTALIS medal.
You mastered numbers! You\'ve completed all 70 levels of NUMBERS⁺ Beginner, earning the INITIA trophy.
Advanced numerical mastery! You conquered all 70 levels of NUMBERS⁺ Advanced, claiming the CONSTANTIA trophy.
Supreme expert in numbers! All 70 levels of NUMBERS⁺ Pro have fallen before you, granting you the CONFECTUS trophy.
Brilliant start with decimals! You completed all levels of DECI⁺ Beginner, winning the VIA trophy.
Decimal precision proven! The 70 levels of DECI⁺ Advanced are yours, deserving the prestigious ALTUS trophy.
Absolute decimal mastery! You\'ve conquered all levels of DECI⁺ Pro, claiming the PERSEVERANTIA trophy.
Like an ancient Roman! You mastered all 70 levels of ROMAS Beginner, obtaining the valuable GRADUS trophy.
Imperial power in Roman numerals! You\'ve completely overcome ROMAS Advanced, winning the FORTITUDO trophy.
Total Roman domination! All 70 challenges of ROMAS Pro have been conquered, rewarding you with the glorious METAM trophy.
Alphanumeric foundations mastered! You completed ALPHANUMBERS Beginner, obtaining the FUNDAMENTUM trophy.
Confirmed alphanumeric genius! All 70 levels of ALPHANUMBERS Advanced are history, rewarding you with the PRAEMIUM trophy.
Supreme alphanumeric mastery! You\'ve defeated all challenges of ALPHANUMBERS Pro, reaching the magnificent GLORIFICUS trophy.
Mental calculation on the rise! You conquered all 70 levels of SUMADD Beginner, earning the SCALA trophy.
Addition and subtraction mastery! All levels of SUMADD Advanced completed, rewarding you with the TENACITAS trophy.
Perfection in calculation! You\'ve mastered all 70 challenges of SUMADD Pro, achieving the coveted PERFECTUS trophy.
Origin of your mathematical dominance! You completed MORE⁺ Beginner, winning the important ORIGO trophy.
Exemplary mathematical progress! All 70 levels of MORE⁺ Advanced have fallen, granting you the prestigious PROFICIUM trophy.
Example of mathematical excellence! You\'ve overcome all challenges of MORE⁺ Pro, achieving the extraordinary EXEMPLARITAS trophy.
Ascent towards genius! You completed all 70 levels of GENIUS⁺ Beginner, earning the coveted ASCENSUS trophy.
Magnificent mental capacity! You\'ve mastered GENIUS⁺ Advanced completely, winning the impressive MAGNIFICUS trophy.
Unlimited mental power! All 70 challenges of GENIUS⁺ Pro have been conquered, crowning you with the legendary POTENS trophy.
You\'ve reached 10th place in the global ranking! Your performance has earned you the HONORABILIS decoration.
Excellent performance! You\'ve positioned yourself in 9th place of the global ranking, deserving the VIRTUOSUS decoration.
Notable mental ability! You\'ve conquered 8th position in the global ranking, winning the distinguished INSIGNIS decoration.
You stand out among thousands! The 7th place of the global ranking is yours, along with the prestigious PRAESTANS decoration.
Illustrious intelligence! You\'ve climbed to 6th position in the global ranking, achieving the brilliant ILLUSTRIS decoration.
Glorious achievement! You\'ve established yourself in 5th place of the global ranking, crowning yourself with the GLORIOSUS decoration.
Venerable skill! You\'ve reached the prestigious 4th position in the global ranking, obtaining the admirable VENERABILIS decoration.
Among the world\'s best! The 3rd place in the global ranking reflects your magnanimous prowess, awarded with the MAGNANIMOUS decoration.
Almost at the top! You\'ve secured the impressive 2nd place in the global ranking, reaching the highest SUMMUM decoration.
Undisputed mental champion! You\'ve conquered the 1st position in the global ranking, consecrating yourself with the supreme EXCELSITUR decoration.
LEGENDARY FEAT! You\'ve completed all 1490 levels of SUMAMENTE, demonstrating extraordinary dedication and mental mastery. The ultimate APEX SUPREMUS "MCDXC" decoration is yours by right.
You haven\'t earned any decorations yet. Keep playing to get them!
Select a game to view its speed ranking
Ranking based on average response time
Play at least 20 games in two different games to see your global ranking.
Play at least 10 games of %1$s in at least two difficulty levels to see your speed ranking.
You need: %1$d more games and %2$d different game(s).
You need: %1$d more games in total, %2$d in Beginner, %3$d in Advanced, %4$d in Pro.
Your average response speed is: %s sec.
So far, your average time is %s sec per response.
You\'re marking an average time of %s sec.
Currently, you respond in an average of %s sec.
For now, your best speed average is %s sec.
Fast! Your current average up to now is %s sec.
On average, you respond every %s sec.
Good pace! Your response average is %s sec.
Here\'s your current speed average: %s sec per response.
To appear in this ranking, you just need to play %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
Keep playing to see your classification: you need %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro).
You still have some way to go. Play %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to unlock the ranking.
%5$s, you only need to complete %1$s games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
A little more to go, %5$s: %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll see your position in this ranking.
Keep it up, %5$s! Play %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll enter the classification.
You\'ve come a long way! Only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to appear in the ranking.
You\'re getting closer to seeing your position. Just %1$s games left (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) to meet the requirement.
The ranking awaits you—only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
%5$s, your effort shows! Just %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro.
Great progress, %5$s! Play %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) to unlock your classification.
Keep it up, %5$s. Just %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be part of the speed ranking.
You\'re almost there! Only %1$s more games: %2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro to appear in the ranking.
Final push: %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be in the classification.
The goal is very close—only %1$s more games (%2$s beginner, %3$s advanced, and %4$s pro).
%5$s, you\'re about to make it: %1$s more games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and your name will appear in the ranking.
Amazing progress, %5$s! Only %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and you\'ll be ranked.
You\'re almost there, %5$s. Complete %1$s games (%2$s beg., %3$s adv., %4$s pro) and join the fastest.
Speed is your ally—don\’t stop now!
You\’re doing great, %1$s! This is just the beginning.
Step by step, %1$s, you\’re getting closer.
You\’re in the zone, keep it up!
Great job, %1$s! That\’s how you get far.
This is what champions do—so do you!
Don\’t stop now, you\’re one step away from the ranking!
Inspiring, %1$s! The ranking is almost yours.
Wow, %1$s! Few get this far, keep going strong.
Go big, %1$s! Show what you can achieve.
Hi, %1$s! Play 36 levels to see your global ranking.
%1$s, you need to play 36 levels to unlock your spot on the global leaderboard.
You\’re not ranked yet, %1$s. Play 36 levels and your global ranking will appear here.
Let\’s go, %1$s! Once you complete 36 levels, you\’ll see your position on the global leaderboard.
%1$s, your global ranking will automatically appear after you play 36 levels.
Ready for the challenge, %1$s? Play 36 levels to enter the global ranking.
%1$s, you\’ve played %2$d levels. Only %3$d more to enter the global ranking.
Great progress, %1$s! You\’ve completed %2$d levels and need just %3$d more to see your ranking.
%1$s, your account shows %2$d levels played. Only %3$d more to unlock the global leaderboard.
%1$s, you\’ve played %2$d out of 36 levels. Just %3$d more to join the leaderboard.
%1$s, you\’ve finished %2$d levels. Play %3$d more to appear in the global ranking.
%1$s, you\’re just %3$d levels away from the 36 needed. You\’ve already played %2$d!
You\’ve played %1$d levels. Only %2$d more to appear in the global ranking.
You\’re on the right track! %1$d levels played, just %2$d more and you\’ll be ranked.
%1$d levels completed. Only %2$d more to unlock your global ranking.
Progress: %1$d out of 36 levels played. %2$d more to reach the global leaderboard.
%1$d levels finished. Just %2$d more to see your spot in the ranking.
Only %2$d more levels to join the global ranking. You\’ve already played %1$d!
You\’ve got this, %1$s! Every level gets you closer to the global ranking.
%1$s, keep it up! The global leaderboard is getting closer.
Don\’t stop now, %1$s. Your effort will pay off soon!
Keep playing, %1$s! The global ranking is waiting for you.
%1$s, every game counts. You\’re almost at the global leaderboard!
Go for it, %1$s! Soon you\'ll see your name among the best.
Don\’t give up! Every level gets you closer to the global ranking.
You\’re so close! Just a little more to make it.
Keep going! The global leaderboard is within your reach.
Great job! Keep it up and you’ll appear in the ranking soon.
Let\’s go for more levels! The global leaderboard is waiting for you.
The goal is near! Keep playing to reach the global ranking.
%1$s, play 21 rounds—at least one in each game and each difficulty level—to appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
Hello, %1$s! Start your journey in SUMAMENTE by playing at least one level in every game and difficulty to compete in the IQ+ Ranking.
%1$s, you haven\'t started your IQ+ Ranking journey yet. Play a level in every game and difficulty to see your position and build your index.
Let\'s go, %1$s! When you complete a level in every game and difficulty, you\'ll see your IQ+ and compare yourself with other players.
%1$s, the first step to stand out in the IQ+ Ranking is to play 21 levels—one in every game and difficulty. Get started today!
Ready for a challenge, %1$s? Play at least 21 different games, one in each difficulty, and unlock your place in the IQ+ Ranking.
For now, your IQ+ is %1$.2f points. Keep playing to improve it!
Provisional IQ+ index: %1$.2f. Play every game and difficulty to compete in the ranking.
You\'re developing your IQ+ in SUMAMENTE: %1$.2f.
IQ+ calculated so far: %1$.2f. Every new level counts.
This is your current IQ+: %1$.2f. Complete all games and difficulties to unlock the ranking!
%1$s, you have played in %2$d different games and difficulties. You need %3$d more to appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
%1$s, you have completed %2$d rounds in different games and difficulties. Only %3$d more to unlock your IQ+ ranking.
%1$s, you\'re progressing: %2$d played, %3$d left. Keep going to reach the IQ+ ranking!
You have played in %2$d different games and difficulties. %3$d left to unlock the IQ+ ranking.
Your progress: %2$d played, %3$d to go. You\'re almost ready to see your position in the IQ+ ranking!
You\'ve completed %2$d different rounds; when you finish %3$d more, you\'ll appear in the IQ+ Ranking.
Keep going! Each new game brings you closer to your place in the IQ+ Ranking.
Keep moving forward; soon you\'ll be ranked and know your position.
You\'re about to become one of the best in SUMAMENTE. Don\'t stop now!
Great progress, %1$s! Just a bit more and you\'ll be competing with the best in the IQ+ Ranking.
Well done, %1$s. Each level brings you closer to your goal of being among the best.
%1$s, don\'t stop now. You\'re almost in the IQ+ Ranking!
